{{Quote|I know as well as you do of the dangers that confronted us. I was the first to consent to your plan. Do not begrudge me the right to complain of some of its consequences; it assists me in adjusting to the inevitable.|The Other, to the One|<ref name="thonboka" />}}
'''The Other''' was a prominent member of an extragalactic [[Droid/Legends|droid]] society<ref name="thonboka" /> named [[Silentium]],<ref name="negtd" /> alongside [[The One (being)|the One]].<ref name="thonboka" /> A fifty-[[Meter/Legends|kilometer]] droid<ref name="egtd">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> capable of traversing galaxies and possessing an incredibly long lifespan, the Other set out with the rest of his people in [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]] to track down the One's "son," [[Vuffi Raa]], a young Silentium created to travel through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and learn as much as he could about the various cultures and civilizations he found. Along with the One and the Rest, the Other helped track Vuffi Raa down in the [[ThonBoka]] [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]], in doing so disrupting a [[Battle of ThonBoka|battle]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the native [[Oswaft]].<ref name="thonboka" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]'' {{1st}}
